parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_active_loans,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN loan_condition = 'Bad Loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS bad_loan_percentage,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade IN ('D','E','F','G') THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) * 100, 2) AS high_risk_grade_percentage,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'A' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_A,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'B' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_B,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'C' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_C,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'D' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_D,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'E' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_E,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'F' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_F,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN grade = 'G' THEN interest_rate END), 2) AS avg_rate_grade_G,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'CANNUGHT' AND loan_condition = 'Bad Loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'CANNUGHT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS default_pct_cannught,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'LEINSTER' AND loan_condition = 'Bad Loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'LEINSTER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS default_pct_leinster,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'MUNSTER' AND loan_condition = 'Bad Loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'MUNSTER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS default_pct_munster,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'NORTHERN-IRL' AND loan_condition = 'Bad Loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'NORTHERN-IRL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS default_pct_northern_irl,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'ULSTER' AND loan_condition = 'Bad Loan' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN region = 'ULSTER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) AS default_pct_ulster
FROM loans_cleaned;
